channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Frontier flight at Denver airport evacuated after gun magazine is found in aircraft  NBC News
  2. Frontier says gun magazine found on plane at DIA left by officer on previous flight  KDVR
  3. Gun ammunition that derailed Frontier flight at DIA belonged to law enforcement, airline says  The Denver Post
  4. Gun magazine found on Frontier Airlines flight, passengers forced to deplane  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  5. Frontier Flight Deplaned After Gun Magazine is Found Before Departure  People.com

item.title: After taking $100 deposits, Trump Mobile changes its terms to say the Trump phone may never be made - Fortune
item.description:
1. After taking $100 deposits, Trump Mobile changes its terms to say the Trump phone may never be made  Fortune
  2. What's the latest on the Trump phone? What we know  USA Today
  3. Terms on Trump Mobile site indicate that phones may never come  The Hill
  4. MAGA Fans Revolt Over Trump Phone Disaster  Yahoo
  5. Trump Mobile's T1 is still vaporware a year and $59M later  AppleInsider

item.title: Why are oil prices not higher? - Financial Times
item.description:
1. Why are oil prices not higher?  Financial Times
  2. Iran war is draining world’s oil buffer at an unprecedented pace  Fortune
  3. The method in Iran’s madness? Closure of Strait of Hormuz echoes a centuries-old Danish play − and is a tragedy for the world order  The Conversation
  4. Chevron CEO says shortages in oil supply will begin appearing  Reuters
  5. Shipping Companies Leverage Arabian Peninsula Truck Routes to Bypass Hormuz  The Maritime Executive

item.title: Stocks are hitting record highs even as Iran war drags on. How long can it last? - MarketWatch
item.description:
1. Stocks are hitting record highs even as Iran war drags on. How long can it last?  MarketWatch
  2. Stock Market News, May 11, 2026: Chip-Stock Frenzy Continues as Stocks Edge Higher  WSJ
  3. Markets News, May 11, 2026: Stocks Start Week Higher as S&P 500, Nasdaq Set New Records; Oil Rises as Trump Calls Iran Peace Plan Response 'Unacceptable'  Investopedia
  4. Wall St inches to higher close, AI fervor edges out Iran impasse  Reuters
  5. Stocks Supported by Strong Earnings and AI Optimism  Yahoo Finance

item.title: Chirayu Rana wants to go the whole way with JPMorgan - eFinancialCareers
item.description:

item.title: Dow Jones, Oil Rise; These Stocks Jump - Investor's Business Daily
item.description:
1. Dow Jones, Oil Rise; These Stocks Jump  Investor's Business Daily
  2. S&P 500 ekes out a gain for first close above 7,400 despite another Iran setback: Live updates  CNBC
  3. Stock market today: Dow rises, S&P 500 and Nasdaq eke out records as chip stocks extend gains  Yahoo Finance
  4. Markets dip as US-Iran ceasefire goes nowhere, leaving Trump with a military option to reopen Hormuz  Fortune
  5. U.S. stock futures fall, oil surges as Trump calls Iran’s latest offer to end war ‘totally unacceptable’  MarketWatch
